overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character in a green shirt walking along a sunny suburban sidewalk lined with palm trees in Los Santos. The camera follows the character through a residential neighborhood with occasional vehicle traffic and pedestrians, passing real estate signs and turning at an intersection with distant city skyline and mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with palm tree lining

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the suburban sidewalk past single-family homes with well-maintained lawns

entered.detail: standard white postal mailbox on a wooden post near the sidewalk edge
single-story green painted house with white trim and front lawn
line of tall palm trees running parallel to the sidewalk creating a canopy effect
paved residential street with lane markings and parked cars
low white wooden fence bordering the front yard of the green bungalow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny suburban street with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk. A white mailbox and picket fence mark the entrance to a green bungalow on the left, while tall palm trees line the path ahead. The street is quiet with only occasional cars passing by on the asphalt road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban street with bus route and real estate signage

events.description: large double-decker bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk as a double-decker bus passes on the adjacent street

notable_agents.action: double-decker bus driving past on the road heading in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large yellow and blue double-decker transit bus moving along the street
real estate sign with 'FORECLOSURE' and 'ROBINSON REAL ESTATE' text
single-story yellow house with brown roof visible in the distance
distant downtown skyscrapers visible on the horizon between the palm trees

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a double-decker bus passes by on the right. A foreclosure sign for Robinson Real Estate appears on the left lawn, and the distant city skyline becomes visible ahead. The palm trees now loom closer as the camera moves forward along the residential street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner intersection with pedestrian crossing

events.description: character turns right at the street corner intersection
garbage truck drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the street corner and continuing along the new sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in red pants and gray jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
green garbage truck with recycling logo driving along the street

entered.detail: large green sanitation truck with recycling symbol on the side
green and white real estate sign reading 'JOHNSONS REAL ESTATE FOR SALE'
single-story white house with gray roof and front porch
street corner with curb ramp and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at a street corner, revealing a new stretch of sidewalk. A garbage truck passes on the right while a woman in red pants walks toward the camera. The camera passes other pedestrians and a new real estate sign, with the city skyline now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale residential street with mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with a mountain backdrop visible ahead, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: large grassy hill and mountain formation visible in the background beyond the houses
low stone retaining wall bordering a front yard
large two-story residential house with dark roof and multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along a quiet residential sidewalk with a prominent mountain backdrop visible ahead. The architecture shifts to larger two-story homes with stone walls, and cars are parked along the right side of the street. Palm trees continue to line the path as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny suburban neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential street to a wider view of the city skyline and distant mountains. It begins with the character walking past a green bungalow with a white picket fence, moving along a concrete sidewalk lined with tall palm trees. As the character progresses, a double-decker bus passes by and a foreclosure sign appears on a lawn, while the distant city skyline gradually emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right at a street corner, passing a garbage truck and pedestrians before the skyline moves to the left of the frame. Finally, the path opens up toward a prominent mountain backdrop as the architecture transitions to larger two-story stone homes with parked cars lining the street.
